trigger_conditions: Use before building, patching, promoting, or executing additional WBS09 Airtable native-view create/configure/repair primitives. Use when automation needs to know whether a manifest primitive is schema-supported, UI-observed, and apply-supported before clicking.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json, and preferably DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID plus DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN for live schema metadata. Use -CollectUiEvidence with -DefaultUiEvidenceTargets or -UiEvidenceTargetKey when fresh native UI evidence is needed. Secret values must never be printed, logged, packaged, or stored.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_capability_map_* under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with generated JSON map, markdown summary, optional live schema metadata JSON, run context, and optional ui_evidence subfolders. Also writes operator_tools/github_desktop_lane/manifests/wbs09_airtable_capability_map.generated.json for follow-on apply tools after inspection.
safety_contract: Default mode is read-only schema/evidence mapping. Optional UI evidence mode opens Airtable native panels and dropdowns for read-only discovery, excludes help/question-mark controls, and does not type, select, add, remove, save, create, edit, delete, or run broad rollout. Generated artifacts must stay under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR.
notes: Promote after v15 validation-due repair evidence. Generated map now marks filter.relative_date.on_or_before_today as guarded single-target apply-supported for Operator Tools Registry::WBS09 - Validation Due only. Use before broadening apply primitives.
